added: Prestige system — once you have 10 Bronze Coins, start a New Venture. You lose all resources and buildings but earn Insight, a permanent currency. Insight earned scales with capital accumulated that venture: more bronze/silver/gold earned before prestiging means more Insight (formula: floor(log2(weighted_capital + 1)), minimum 1). The Prestige page shows a live preview of how much Insight you would earn right now
Insight weights are config-driven (prestige_config.json): bronze ×1, silver ×1000, gold ×1,000,000, platinum ×1,000,000,000 — easy to tweak without touching code
Jobs with multiple rewards now all apply correctly on completion

Skill trees — spend Insight on permanent upgrades that persist across all ventures. Three trees: Hustle (job rewards, speed, queue), Industry (building output and cost per building), Commerce (market price range, buy/sell bonuses). Trees auto-expand as new skills are added to the JSON
Job Queue — unlock via the Hustle skill tree. Queue up to 5 jobs (upgradeable to 20); queued jobs start automatically when the current one finishes
Upgrades page — in-run upgrades that boost Manual Labor rewards and Property output. Resets on Prestige. Weaker than prestige skills but available every run
Venture statistics — Statistics page now shows three columns per metric: This Venture, Previous Venture, and All Time. All Time tracks cumulative totals across every run
Multiplier system — output formula is base × upgrades × prestige_skills. Upgrades and prestige skills stack multiplicatively
Properties page and Market page now display effective rates and prices when upgrades or skills are active
changed: Manual Labor job cards now show effective reward ranges and durations after multipliers are applied
Settings page restructured with UI and Gameplay tabs; dark mode toggle moved to the UI tab
Statistics page now has tabs: Capital, Basic Resources, Manual Labor, and Properties
fixed: Manual Labor job statistics now correctly tracked per job — completing 'Beg for Coins' and 'Trade at Market' no longer inflates each other's earnings

added: Capital currency system with 5 coin tiers: Copper, Bronze, Silver, Gold, and Platinum
Bank — exchange lower-tier coins for higher-tier coins (1 billion of one tier = 1 of the next). Supports exchanging one at a time or all at once
Manual Labor — first job: Beg for Coins. Takes 5 seconds and rewards between 1 and 50 copper coins. Only one job can run at a time
Statistics page — shows your current coin balances, lifetime coins earned and spent per tier, and how many times each job has been completed
changed: Statistics tab moved to just above the Settings and About buttons in the sidebar

added: Initial release of DyWorld Inc.
Top bar showing the current system time and a menu for saving, loading, exporting, importing, and resetting your game
Sidebar with navigation tabs: Manual Labor, Market, Bank, and Statistics
Settings page with a toggle to switch between light and dark theme
About page showing developer info and this changelog
Game progress is automatically saved to your browser and restored when you return
Market and Manual Labor pages (placeholders, content coming soon)
